title: pelazoneuron abruptum var. grande
intro: Pelazoneuron abruptum var. grande is a rare and lesser-known variant of the Pelazoneuron abruptum plant, a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe gastrointestinal problems, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Pelazoneuron abruptum var. grande can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
intro_study: According to "Izvestiia Akademii nauk. Seriia biologicheskaia", Pelazoneuron abruptum var. grande contains a plant heparin that enhances anticoagulative and fibrinolytic plasma properties and decreases platelet aggregation.
